boat.full_description:
Ivy Green was designed, by Ed Burnett, to be sailed by two people over 50 years old; to be a sea kindly, safe, comfortable cruising boat; to sail well, look well, be easy to manoeuvre and easy to maintain. She comfortably meets all of those requirements.
Launched in 2003 at the Elephant Boatyard, Ivy Green spent ten years on the East Coast before returning to Solent waters in 2014. She has cruised the East Coast, the English Channel and Scottish waters.

Ivy Green is a regular at OGA and classic sailing events around the Solent.

Her modern strip plank construction combines a warm varnished interior, with light weight and stiffness, ensuring that she lives up to Ed Burnett’s reputation for “Turbo charged gaffers”.
boat.name: Ivy Green
boat.short_description: Ivy Green is regular at OGA and classic sailing events around the Solent.
